name: S-Bank
author: Sam-e
description: Demo VCV Rack modules built on the S-Bank analog-emulation DSP library.

modules.name: Vactrol LPG
modules.description: Topology-preserving vactrol low-pass gate (Buchla 292 style) with Both/VCA/Lowpass modes.

modules.name: Strike
modules.description: Clean zero-bleed, envelope-driven dual low-pass gate: shaped decay, ping, memory, continuous material morph.
